description: Provides defense, combat support, and security
materialRequirements: Wood and stone for defensive structures, walls

tieredBenefits.description: Small patrol, prevents Meadows-level enemy spawns
Medium patrol, prevents Black Forest-level enemy spawns
Large patrol, prevents Swamp/Mountains-level enemy spawns
Very large patrol, prevents Plains/Mistlands-level spawns
2x shield generator range, prevents Ashlands spawns (requires high-level trader)

randomTalk: All quiet on the wall... mostly.
Did you hear something? ...Probably just the wind.
Standing guard is easy. It's the not-falling-asleep part that's hard.
I've got my eye on you. And the walls. And that suspicious rock over there.
The walls are secure. I checked. Twice.
You know, I could really go for some mead right about now.
Nothing gets past me. Well, except that deer earlier.
Why does nobody ever say 'nice wall'? I worked hard on that route.
Some days I wonder if the greylings are mocking me.
I once stood guard so still a bird landed on my helmet. True story.
If anyone asks, I was NOT leaning on my shield just now.
My feet hurt, my back aches, but the village stands. Worth it.
I have the final say around here. I say 'halt', and they halt. Usually.
Have I ever told you about my boots theory?
Now my watch is ended.  Oh, it's not ended? Back to it then.
randomGreets: Halt! Oh, it's you. Carry on.
The village stands, as do I.
randomGoodbye: Off you go then. I'll hold the walls.
